sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40537" key="e)piplh/kteira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπλήκτ-ειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιπλήκτης</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.233</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
